name: Deacom ERP for Process Manufacturing REST API
what_it_does: Deacom ERP REST API for process manufacturing companies in food and beverage, chemical, nutraceutical, cosmetics, and pharmaceutical industries to manage production, inventory, quality control, compliance, traceability, and financials — enabling automated manufacturing order management, batch tracking, formula/recipe management, compliance reporting, and supply chain visibility through Deacom's purpose-built process manufacturing ERP. Enables AI agents to manage sales orders for customer order entry and fulfillment automation, handle production orders for manufacturing batch and run management automation, access inventory management for raw material and finished goods inventory automation, retrieve quality control for COA and spec testing automation, manage traceability for lot tracking and recall management automation, handle formula management for recipe and specification versioning automation, access compliance reporting for FDA, GMP, and regulatory reporting automation, retrieve warehouse management for receiving and shipping automation, manage financial management for cost of goods and profitability automation, and integrate Deacom with lab systems, 3PL, and customer portals for process manufacturing automation.
use_cases: Automating production batch scheduling and inventory management for food manufacturing automation agents
Managing lot traceability and recall readiness for food safety compliance automation agents
Tracking quality control specifications and certificates of analysis for CPG automation agents
Integrating customer orders and EDI with production planning for process manufacturer automation agents
not_for: Discrete/assembly manufacturing (Deacom is process/batch manufacturing, not automotive or electronics assembly)
Project-based manufacturing (Deacom is process manufacturing, not job shop or engineer-to-order)
Large enterprise process manufacturers (Deacom targets mid-market, not SAP-scale global manufacturers)
best_when: A mid-market food and beverage, chemical, or nutraceutical manufacturer wanting AI agents to automate production batches, lot traceability, quality control, and compliance reporting through Deacom's industry-specialized process manufacturing ERP.
avoid_when: SINGLE-DATABASE ARCHITECTURE: Deacom uses single database for all operations; automated multi-instance assumption creates architecture_mismatch for highly distributed manufacturing operations; automated must work within Deacom's unified architecture. PROCESS MANUFACTURING SPECIFIC: Deacom is purpose-built for process manufacturing; automated universal-ERP assumption creates feature_gap for discrete, job shop, or project manufacturing requirements; automated must verify Deacom fits the manufacturing model. FDA COMPLIANCE CONFIGURATION: FDA 21 CFR Part 11 and GMP compliance requires specific Deacom configuration; automated built-in-compliance assumption creates configuration_required for regulated industries without proper setup; automated must configure compliance modules properly. DEACOM ACQUIRED BY SYSPRO: Deacom was acquired by SYSPRO in 2021; automated standalone assumption creates product_roadmap_uncertainty for long-term platform strategy; automated should evaluate both Deacom and SYSPRO for process manufacturing needs.

auth.notes: Deacom uses API key + Basic Auth for ERP REST API. REST API with JSON. Wayne, PA HQ. Founded 1994 by Jay Deakins. Acquired by SYSPRO in 2021. Products: Single ERP system for process manufacturing (sales, production, inventory, quality, financials). Used by 350+ process manufacturers. Focused on food/beverage, chemical, nutraceutical, cosmetics, and cannabis. Competes with Plex, Epicor, and Infor for mid-market process manufacturing ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for qualified manufacturers; production requires Deacom subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user or site; module-based pricing; professional services for implementation
pricing.notes: Wayne PA. SYSPRO subsidiary. Annual subscription. 350+ process manufacturers. Food/beverage specialty ERP.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; ERP APIs throttled per deployment capacity

known_agent_gotchas: LOT NUMBERS ARE PROCESS-CRITICAL: Process manufacturing traceability requires lot number on all transactions; automated lot-free assumption creates traceability_gap for transactions without lot numbers; automated must assign lot numbers to all production and inventory transactions

FORMULA VERSIONING AFFECTS PRODUCTION: Production orders reference specific formula version; automated latest-formula assumption creates production_variance for orders needing specific approved formula version; automated must reference correct approved formula version

YIELD CALCULATIONS ARE BATCH-SPECIFIC: Process manufacturing yield varies by batch; automated fixed-yield assumption creates inaccurate_inventory for variable yield processes; automated must capture and record actual yield per batch

CATCH WEIGHT IS COMMON: Food and chemical industries use catch weight (variable weight per unit); automated fixed-unit assumption creates inventory_error for catch weight items measured by both count and weight; automated must handle catch weight calculations

QUALITY HOLDS BLOCK SHIPMENT: QC holds prevent inventory release for shipping; automated available-inventory assumption creates shipment_blocked for lots on quality hold; automated must check quality hold status before confirming shipment availability
agent_readiness.security_notes: Process manufacturing ERP. SOC2, FDA-21CFR11. API key. US. Production, quality, and compliance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Process ERP. SOC2, FDA-21CFR11. API key. US. Manufacturing batch and quality control data.
